name: Scalloped Carrots
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan over medium heat, cook and stir butter and flour until smooth and bubbly, about 2 minutes.
2. Gradually add milk and lemon juice; cook and stir until thickened.
3. Add celery salt, salt, and pepper; mix well.
4. Remove from the heat.
5. In four greased 2-1/2 quart baking dishes, layer half of the carrots, sauce, cheese, and crackers.
6. Repeat layers.
7. Bake, uncovered at 350 degrees for 45-50 minutes or until the top is golden brown. Serve immediately.
